name: Pesto Potato-Sausage Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb Red potatoes (small, halved or quartered if large)
1 lb Smoked hot sausage or kielbasa
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, combine the potatoes with enough salted water to cover.
Heat until boiling, then simmer for about 12 minutes. Drain and place in a large bowl.
2. Halve the sausage lengthwise and cut crosswise into 1/2 inch diagonal slices.
In the same skillet used to cook the potatoes, sauté the sausage over medium heat until browned, about 10 minutes. Transfer to the bowl with potatoes and add tomatoes.
3. In a small bowl, combine vinegar, pesto, and 1/2 teaspoon freshly ground pepper; mix.
Add to the potato mixture and toss. Serve warm or at room temperature.
